title: TRANSFORME USANDO O VERBO ENTRE PARÊNTESES
answer: I HAD THE KIDS GO TO BED EARLY
subtitle: THE KIDS WENT TO BED EARLY           (TO HAVE = MANDAR)

title: Repita a frase
answer: I HAD THE KIDS GO TO BED EARLY
translate: EU MANDEI AS CRIANÇAS IREM PARA A CAMA CEDO

title: TRANSFORME USANDO O VERBO ENTRE PARÊNTESES
answer: WE HAD THE UBER DRIVER COLLECT US
subtitle: THE UBER DRIVER COLLECTED US           (TO HAVE = MANDAR)

title: Repita a frase
answer: WE HAD THE UBER DRIVER COLLECT US
translate: NÓS MANDAMOS O MOTORISTA DO UBER NOS PEGAR

title: TRANSFORME USANDO O VERBO ENTRE PARÊNTESES
answer: I HAD MY ASSISTANT CALL MR SMITH
a: I HAD MY ASSISTANT CALL MR. SMITH
subtitle: MY ASSISTANT CALLED MR. SMITH           (TO HAVE = MANDAR)

title: Repita a frase
answer: I HAD MY ASSISTANT CALL MR. SMITH
translate: EU MANDEI MINHA(MEU) ASSISTENTE LIGAR PARA O SENHOR SMITH

title: TRANSFORME USANDO O VERBO ENTRE PARÊNTESES
answer: WE LET THE GIRLS WATCH CARTOONS

answer: WE LET THE GIRLS WATCH CARTOONS
translate: NÓS DEIXAMOS AS GAROTAS ASSISTIR AOS DESENHOS ANIMADOS
